subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Our presence unto him who hath walked the path of God, manifest and straight, and held fast unto the cord [3.5s]... ...The Ancient Beauty hath consented to be bound with chains that mankind may be released from its bondage, and hath accepted to be made a prisoner
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا الی الذی سلک سبیل الله الواضح المستقیم و تمسک بالعروه
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @sacrifice of the Manifestation of God redeems the world, @praise and encouragement, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @power of prayer, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
